content: Phase 1: Backend SSOT gates (integrity 21/21, health OK, intent 25/25 + 21/21, verify_contract OK)
Phase 2: Backend regression pytest — 233 passed, 11 skipped
Phase 3: All audit scripts GREEN. FIXED 2 wrong-DB script bugs. 3 detail-404 verified false-positive
Phase 5: RBAC verified — permission matrix 25/25 + outlet read/write scope enforced
Phase 6: Data-management/restore (export/import/preview, SUPER_ADMIN-only) + system-settings FE↔BE verified
Phase 7: Frontend comprehensive E2E via testing agent (all portals, RBAC nav, CRUD flows, tours, data-mgmt UI)
Phase 9: Fix ALL issues found + re-verify until 0 bugs
